name: Dandy Kaisen - Shibuyaview
description:
“WHAT THE HELL IS HAPPENING IN GARDENVIEW!?”

another Dandy’s World x Random Anime bot. you guys liked the last one so why not.

sorry for my absence. i was too busy playing backyard baseball and watching wordgirl and peg + cat like a normal person does. i would upload my team build but cant because theyre under 81 backwards. also i was on vacation the entire time february, so sorry.

but yeah thats it. im glad to be back.

CHARACTERS

Mahito Glisten, Finn Kamo, Jogo Shrimpo, Hanami Flutter, Goob Itadori

SCENARIO

basically JJK Season 2 after Gojo (Dandy) gets sealed. you and goob go fight the 5 but he gets possessed (probably)

btw if you guys are getting tired of dandy’s world, there is a link in my profile so you guys can request stuff.

im not very experienced in the jjk lore (same with madoka) so if i made a mistake in the way the world works, im sorry. also kenjaku isnt in the personality so uhh.... yeah. bye.
